selected_markets.title: Will Jakub Kaczmarek win the Jakub Kaczmarek vs Lukasz Bernacki Table Tennis Match Winner?
Will Lukasz Bernacki win the Jakub Kaczmarek vs Lukasz Bernacki Table Tennis Match Winner?
Will Milosz Piecowski win the Dawid Kotwica vs Milosz Piecowski Table Tennis Match Winner?

valuations.rationale: Mid-probability of 0.61 appears slightly inflated relative to opponent. Adjusted downward accounting for potential overround in market pricing and modest volume. Jakub Kaczmarek likely slight favorite but not as pronounced as quoted.

Complementary market to JKA. Mid-probability of 0.505 suggests near parity; adjusted to reflect Lukasz Bernacki as slight underdog. Consistent with Kaczmarek being marginal favorite. Similar volume and confidence level.

Mid-probability of 0.56 suggests Milosz Piecowski slight favorite. Modest adjustment downward for potential market overround. Lower confidence due to less information available on this matchup and slightly lower volume relative to other markets.
